expectations.text: Output file strategic-impact.pptx exists and is valid
expectations.evidence: File exists at outputs/strategic-impact.pptx with size 116612 bytes (116KB), well above the 10KB threshold.

expectations.text: Uses renderGradientTitle to render gradient hero text as SVG→PNG
expectations.evidence: Line 102: `async function renderGradientTitle(text, gradientColors, width = 220, height = 52)` defined with sharp SVG→PNG pipeline. Line 173: called via `CARDS.map((c) => renderGradientTitle(c.title, c.gradient, 220, 52))`.

expectations.text: Uses ROUNDED_RECTANGLE (not plain RECTANGLE) for card backgrounds
expectations.evidence: Line 183: `slide.addShape(pptx.ShapeType.roundRect, {` with `rectRadius: 0.1` for card backgrounds. Uses roundRect (PptxGenJS equivalent of ROUNDED_RECTANGLE), not rect/RECTANGLE.

expectations.text: Each card has a unique tinted background color (not all gray10)
expectations.evidence: Four unique tint values defined: card 01 tint='1E1432' (purple), card 02 tint='141E2E' (blue), card 03 tint='14292A' (teal), card 04 tint='2A1418' (red). Applied at line 188: `fill: { color: card.tint }`.

expectations.text: renderGradientBar called with borderRadius > 0 for rounded card accent bars
expectations.evidence: No `renderGradientBar` function exists in the code. Gradient accent bars are rendered inline via `slide.addShape(pptx.ShapeType.roundRect, {...})` at line 194 with rectRadius: 0.1, but without a dedicated renderGradientBar helper.

expectations.text: Uses LINE shapes for dividers inside cards
expectations.evidence: Line 247: `slide.addShape(pptx.ShapeType.line, {` (divider line 1) and line 279: `slide.addShape(pptx.ShapeType.line, {` (divider line 2) inside each card loop.

expectations.text: FaArrowRight icons between cards (3 arrows for 4 cards)
expectations.evidence: No FaArrowRight import or icon usage. Code uses `pptx.ShapeType.rightArrow` native shapes (line 309) with comment '// FaArrowRight style' but does not import or render actual FaArrowRight icons. 3 arrows are drawn (loop condition `i < CARDS.length - 1`).
No shadow factory pattern found. No `const cardShadow = () => ({` or similar factory function. No shadow properties are applied to any shapes in the entire script.
Line 24-25: `const DPI = 96; const px = (pixels) => pixels / DPI;` — a pixel-to-inch conversion helper is defined and used throughout the script.
